editor.info_thermal: Receipt Printer template ({size} paper) — Sends output directly to a thermal printer like Epson or Star. Renders on the device without needing a server connection.
editor.info_legacy_php: Browser template (Legacy PHP) — Prints using your browser's print dialog. Requires a server connection to generate the receipt.
editor.info_browser: Browser template — Prints using your browser's print dialog. Renders on the device without needing a server connection.
editor.no_orders: No POS orders found. Create an order in the POS to preview templates.
editor.php_save_notice: PHP templates require saving before the preview updates.
editor.preview_failed: Preview failed. Save the template and try again.
